projectDescription: A Minecraft NeoForge mod providing modular, fully customizable tools, weapons, and armor crafted from interchangeable parts and materials defined via data packs.
keyFeatures: Modular gear system: every tool/weapon/armor piece is built from swappable parts (main, rod, tip, grip, binding, coating, etc.)
Data pack driven: materials, parts, and traits are fully defined via JSON data packs — no code required
25+ gear types including swords, hammers, paxels, bows, crossbows, tridents, armor, and curios
Trait system with 20+ built-in trait effects (attribute bonuses, enchantments, self-repair, magnet, etc.)
Material grading system that affects gear stats
Alloy-making machines to create custom compound materials
Blueprint/template crafting system that eliminates recipe conflicts
Add-on API: add new gear types, part types, and trait types in Java
Compatibility with JEI, EMI, Curios/Caelus, and NeoForge
Material Book and in-game guide for player reference
publicApiSurface: Material (api/material/Material.java) — material data model and serialization
TraitEffect / TraitEffectType (api/traits/) — custom trait effect API
GearProperty / NumberProperty / BooleanProperty (api/property/) — gear stat definitions
SGearCommand (/sgear) — in-game commands for materials, parts, traits, grades
